heading: Federal assistance in identification and location of sex offenders relocated as a result of a major disaster
label: 20943 Federal assistance in identification and location of sex offenders relocated as a result of a major disaster
text: The Attorney General shall provide assistance to jurisdictions in the identification and location of a sex offender relocated as a result of a major disaster.
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to , The Public Health and Welfare, prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 16943 of Title 42
